title: CheckpointEvidence
description: Signed checkpoint and fork record — captures agent state at a checkpoint boundary, enabling provenance across forks and replay. Canonical source for wasmagent-js and wasmagent-train-replay.

parent_run_id.description: The run_id of the originating AEP record this checkpoint was taken from.

fork_of.description: If this checkpoint is a fork, the checkpoint_id of the ancestor checkpoint; null for root checkpoints.

state_digest.description: Cryptographic digest of the captured agent state at checkpoint time.

created_at_ms.description: Epoch-millisecond timestamp when the checkpoint was created.

run_id.description: The run_id assigned to the new run spawned from this checkpoint (if any).

signature.description: Optional signature over the checkpoint payload for tamper evidence.
